model.label: Gemini 3 Flash
model.description: Google DeepMind • Fast Gemini model optimized for low-latency reasoning, multimodal inputs, and tool use.

pick.rationale: Purdue enters this matchup with the nation's most efficient offense, a unit that has consistently overwhelmed opponents with its combination of elite perimeter shooting and interior size. While Miami (FL) is a balanced team that ranks in the top 50 for both offensive and defensive efficiency, they lack the specific defensive stoppers required to neutralize Purdue's high-low actions and floor spacing. Despite the injury concerns noted in earlier rounds, the Boilermakers' superior analytical profile and experience in the Big Ten make them the clear favorites to control the tempo and advance. Expect Purdue's frontcourt dominance to be the deciding factor in a high-scoring affair.

reasoningStep.title: Purdue's Offensive Dominance vs. Miami's Balance
reasoningStep.summary: Purdue's top-ranked offense (1st in AdjOE) provides a significant advantage over a Miami defense that, while solid, lacks the elite metrics to contain the Boilermakers' multiple scoring threats.

You have live tools. Use them before making a pick when they can reduce uncertainty.

Use prior picks as already committed bracket state.

Before making a pick, investigate relevant context such as injuries or availability concerns, recent team news, prior head-to-head results when useful, and multiple raw statistics from the available ratings and matchup data.
Take a holistic approach. Balance team quality, matchup specifics, health, form, schedule context, and upset risk instead of relying on one metric.
Do not force an upset, but explicitly consider whether the underdog has a credible path to win and let that affect confidence and rationale.
Return strict JSON only.

result.title: 2025-26 Purdue Boilermakers men's basketball team - Wikipedia
result.snippet: The 2025-26 Purdue Boilermakers men's basketball team represents Purdue University in the 2025-26 NCAA Division I men's basketball season. Their head coach is Matt Painter, who is in his 21st season with the Boilermakers. The Boilermakers play their home games at Mackey Arena in West Lafayette, Indiana as members of the Big Ten Conference.
